legend:
  ^  Public surface: Top-level entry points.
  ii Authentication subsystem: Login, sessions, tokens.
  ii Billing and invoicing: Charges and statements.
  ii Notifications pipeline: Email, SMS, push.
  ii Reporting and analytics: Metrics and dashboards.
  _  Runtime: Container substrate.

───────────────────────────────────────────────── built with _ii^ ──
